# 🌐 Global Micro-Remittance Bridge - Organization

This is the central repository for the Global Micro-Remittance Bridge organization. It contains shared community health files, organization-wide policies, and the organization profile.

## 🚀 Project Vision
Our goal is to enable any SME worldwide to receive affordable international payments using the Stellar network and Soroban smart contracts, eliminating traditional banking friction.

## 📂 Organization Structure
This project is split into several micro-repositories to ensure a clean separation of concerns:
- [contracts](https://github.com/Global-Micro-Remittance-Bridge/contracts): Soroban smart contracts.
- [payment-api](https://github.com/Global-Micro-Remittance-Bridge/payment-api): Core backend orchestration.
- [merchant-dashboard](https://github.com/Global-Micro-Remittance-Bridge/merchant-dashboard): SME management portal.
- [anchor-adapter](https://github.com/Global-Micro-Remittance-Bridge/anchor-adapter): Integration layer for fiat on/off ramps.
- [transaction-indexer](https://github.com/Global-Micro-Remittance-Bridge/transaction-indexer): Blockchain event monitor.
- [docs](https://github.com/Global-Micro-Remittance-Bridge/docs): Technical and business documentation.
- [infrastructure](https://github.com/Global-Micro-Remittance-Bridge/infrastructure): DevOps and deployment guides.
- [sdk](https://github.com/Global-Micro-Remittance-Bridge/sdk): Developer tools.
- [website](https://github.com/Global-Micro-Remittance-Bridge/website): Marketing landing page.
- [demo-app](https://github.com/Global-Micro-Remittance-Bridge/demo-app): Sample merchant implementation.
- [examples](https://github.com/Global-Micro-Remittance-Bridge/examples): Integration snippets.

## 🛠️ Tech Stack
- **Blockchain:** Stellar, Soroban (Rust)
- **Backend:** NestJS, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Redis
- **Frontend:** Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- **DevOps:** Docker, Terraform, GitHub Actions
